message:
fix(core): clippy pedantic lints + 3 new mux_pool batch render tests

Address clippy warnings across frankenterm-core without changing behavior:

Lint suppressions (intentional):
- cx.rs: #[allow(clippy::clone_on_copy)] on tests that intentionally
  exercise Clone trait on Copy types (RuntimePreset, RuntimeTuning)
- cx.rs: #[allow(clippy::type_complexity)] on spawn_bounded tests with
  complex future return types inherent to the API
- search_bridge.rs: #[allow(clippy::needless_return)] where explicit
  return is required by cfg-gated dual-runtime pattern
- mux_client.rs: #[allow(clippy::needless_pass_by_ref_mut)] where &mut
  is needed on the tokio borrow_and_update path

Lint fixes:
- outcome.rs: replace closure |s| Outcome::err(s) with method reference
  Outcome::err (clippy::redundant_closure)
- runtime_compat.rs: add Default impl for JoinSet<T> so new() delegates
  to Default::default() (clippy::new_without_default)
- scope_watchdog.rs: assert!(x.len() > 0) → assert!(!x.is_empty()),
  remove unused mut on setup_tree() binding

New tests for mux_pool batch rendering:
- pool_batch_render_large_batch_preserves_order: 50-pane batch verifying
  response ordering at pipeline scale
- pool_batch_render_duplicate_pane_ids: same pane_id requested 3 times
  returns 3 distinct responses
- pool_batch_render_pipeline_depth_one: pipeline_depth=1 forces sequential
  mode, validating the non-pipelined fallback path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -631,6 +631,7 @@ mod tests {
         (SearchBridge::new(searcher), text_provider)
     }
 
+    #[allow(clippy::needless_return)] // return required by cfg-gated dual-runtime pattern
     async fn raw_search_baseline(
         searcher: Arc<TwoTierSearcher>,
         query: String,
